title: Check each term
text: $$[vt**2]={LT}^{\left(-1\right)} T^2=LT$$. $$[at]={LT}^{\left(-2\right)} T={LT}^{\left(-1\right)}$$. Neither term has dimensions L, and the two terms don't even match each other.

title: Conclusion
text: Since the right-hand side terms have dimensions LT and $${LT}^{\left(-1\right)}$$ - neither equal to $$[s]=L$$ - this equation is not dimensionally consistent.
